tools.name: quotes
tools.description: Retrieve personalized auto insurance quotes and render the corresponding widget. Always include the pricing caveat from pricingCaveat when presenting results (the numbers are averages, not actual quotes, and real prices require completing quoting on Jerry). Do not assume or auto-generate values for required parameters without explicit user confirmation. If optional parameters are not provided, omit them. Prompt the user for any missing required values or to confirm suggested defaults before proceeding.

tools.name: repair-estimate
tools.description: Estimate car repair cost given vehicle info, repair service, and ZIP. If the tool throw error, no matter job not found or price not be provided, do not attempt to generate or infer any additional answer. Simply report the error message to the user.
